title: tragia alienata
intro: Tragia alienata, also known as the tragia plant, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Tragia alienata is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, decoctions, or topical creams, and it is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
